summary: Completed read-only comparison of P1-09 Event-Triggered Behavior Recall and feedback/correction writeback expectations against current DinoBrain. Found a partial current memory loop via UserPromptSubmit preflight, Context Pack retrieval, finish_task trace growth/compounding, record_feedback_correction, and behavior eval, but P1-09's live behavior-event registry, performed/skipped/not_applicable behavior firing ledger, Slack/notification receipt contract, and Korean UI proof are missing.
decisions: Classified P1-09 as partial overall: current DinoBrain has feedback writeback and later retrieval/eval mechanisms, but not event-triggered behavior recall at the specified hooks.
Treated current user request as read-only; no repository/source files were edited.
next_steps: Implement a live behavior-event registry for session_start, user_prompt, pre_action, pre_mutation, external_send, evidence_gap, task_completion, handoff, error, and direction_change.
Add a behavior/notification ledger with event_name, behavior_id, performed/skipped/not_applicable, evidence, tool/destination safety, skip/not_applicable reason, and notification_receipt_state.
Add fixtures and UI/API proof for event-trigger outcomes and correction-to-candidate source lineage.
search_queries: P1-09 Event-Triggered Behavior Recall feedback correction writeback performed skipped not_applicable
